pattern: A single block of ones can never contain a zero followed by another one, so the presence of the substring '01' is exactly the disqualifier.
hints: Think about what it means for the ones to break into more than one group.
If the ones ever resume after a zero, that zero sits between two separate groups.
The string has at most one segment of ones precisely when it never contains a '0' immediately before a '1'.

edge_inputs.description: one followed only by zeros is still one segment

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randrange(1, max(2, size) + 1)
    s = '1' + ''.join(rng.choice('01') for _ in range(n - 1))
    return [s]
